reference: Hello, Doctor. I am twenty-four years old. I got married and have a two-year-old child. Mine was a cesarean section. My blood group is B negative and my hemoglobin count was seven when I checked it a year ago. Nowadays, I am feeling very tired when I wash clothes or clean the house. Whenever I wash clothes, I get back pain for almost two-three days. My height is one hundred and fifty-nine centimeters and my weight is sixty-five kilograms. I am unable to do any kind of work that puts pressure on my hands continuously for five minutes. Can you please suggest what I need to do?
text: Yeah, but you made a promise.
